case_title: KENNEDY, WAYNE vs. STURNER, SUSAN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1700 GOLDEN GATE AVE #17, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE SERVED AUG-29-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN
ORDER DENYING APPLICATION FOR STAY OF EXECUTION
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN DOES I - X SUMMONS ISSUED

STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, ORDER ORDERED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY SO THAT THE SIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF NEW JUDGMENT AND JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION MAY BE FILED DEFAULT OF SEP-06-1995 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF SEP-06-1995 SET ASIDE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STURNER, SUSAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1700 GOLDEN GATE AVE, #17, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $982.55 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $982.55, STAYED UNTIL OCT-02-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
